creator: avos@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 160173
Patch.diff

- Add HUNSPELL option (disabled by default, not used when KDE is selected).
- Use OPTIONS helpers where possible.
- Use qt4-linguisttools instead of qt4-linguist for *.ts files.
- Depend on qt4-xml and qt4-gui even when KDE is selected (they are used anyway).
- Sort USE_XORG.
- Regenerate patches.
- Bump PORTREVISION.
